requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a quiet studio cyclorama. Use only a refined hand/forearm appears: well-groomed, neutral as the only moving person or hand. A slim black metal clothing rack is nearby. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A warm, minimal studio scene. Center frame: a long oatmeal beige trench coat from the reference image hangs on a natural wood hanger, which sits on a slim black metal clothing rack. The backdrop is a warm cream seamless cyclorama that continues into the floor. Soft directional light from camera-left creates a gentle highlight along the coat’s faille texture, with a very subtle, clean shadow on the floor. The shot begins still and composed, then the camera performs a slow, smooth push-in toward the coat. After the first moment, a well-groomed hand and forearm in a slim black knit sleeve enters from frame right and lightly smooths the coat’s left lapel once, then gently straightens the belt so it lies flat, keeping all movements slow. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: A warm, minimal studio scene. Center frame: a long oatmeal beige trench coat from the reference image hangs on a natural wood hanger, which sits on a slim black metal clothing rack. The backdrop is a warm cream seamless cyclorama that continues into the floor. Soft directional light from camera-left creates a gentle highlight along the coat’s faille texture, with a very subtle, clean shadow on the floor. The shot begins still and composed, then the camera performs a slow, smooth push-in toward the coat. After the first moment, a well-groomed hand and forearm in a slim black knit sleeve enters from frame right and lightly smooths the coat’s left lapel once, then gently straightens the belt so it lies flat, keeping all movements slow and precise. The hand exits the frame. As the camera continues its unhurried push-in, the subtle sheen of the silk-cotton faille catches the light naturally, emphasizing the refined oatmeal tone and the coat’s long, elegant silhouette on the rack. The shot comes to rest in a centered, symmetrical hero composition of the trench, calm and premium.
requests.audio_direction: Low, understated piano bed with a soft room tone; a subtle cloth rustle as the hand touches the lapel; no voiceover.
